title: DXC Technology Faces Stock Slump, Pitches AI Turnaround at Annual Meeting
excerpt: DXC Technology (NYSE:DXC) held its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders, with Chairman David Herzog acknowledging dissatisfaction with the company’s stock per...
content_html:
MarketBeat

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 10:06 AM EDT 6 min read

Key Points

  • Interested in DXC Technology Company.? Here are five stocks we like better.

  • DXC Technology acknowledged dissatisfaction with its fiscal 2026 stock performance, but management said the company is pursuing a turnaround centered on AI-infused offerings and a push toward sustainable, profitable growth.

  • CEO Raul Fernandez said DXC's investor day laid out a financial framework through fiscal 2029 that calls for a return to organic growth, higher non-GAAP EBIT margins and strong free cash flow, supported by a new global partnership with Anthropic.

  • Stockholders elected all nine directors and ratified Deloitte as auditor, but they rejected the proposed expansion of the 2017 Omnibus Incentive Plan even as they approved the company's advisory executive pay vote and a separate director equity plan amendment.

DXC Technology (NYSE:DXC) held its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders, with Chairman David Herzog acknowledging dissatisfaction with the company's stock performance in fiscal 2026 while pointing to artificial intelligence initiatives and recently outlined financial goals as key elements of the company's turnaround strategy.

Speaking on behalf of the board, Herzog said directors are "unsatisfied with our stock price performance during fiscal 2026" and are committed to long-term shareholder value appreciation. He said the board is working with senior leadership to chart a path toward "sustainable, profitable growth."

→ Buyback Boom: These 3 Companies Are Betting Billions on Their Own Stocks

Herzog highlighted what he described as "encouraging building blocks" for the company's future, including new AI-infused solutions across DXC's offerings. He said the company's ability to operate customers' mission-critical systems underpins its global infrastructure business. Herzog also cited DXC's insurance software and services business as a market leader, with AI-based applications aimed at modernizing legacy infrastructure without costly or risky replacement projects.

CEO Points to Investor Day Framework and Anthropic Partnership

Raul Fernandez, DXC's president and chief executive officer, said the company used its investor day in New York last month to present "a clear and compelling picture of who DXC is becoming."

→ Cybersecurity Stocks Are Holding Up as the AI Trade Starts to Crack

Fernandez said DXC outlined a disciplined financial framework through fiscal 2029, including a return to organic growth, expansion in non-GAAP EBIT margin and continued strong free cash flow generation. He said the company was transparent that the current fiscal year represents a transition.

content_html_zh:
市场节奏

2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 10:06（美国东部时间） 阅读 6 分钟

要点

  • 对DXC科技公司感兴趣？ 这是我们更喜欢的五只股票。
  • DXC Technology 承认对其 2026 财年的股票表现不满意，但管理层表示，该公司正在寻求以人工智能产品为中心的扭亏为盈，并推动可持续的盈利增长。
  • 首席执行官 Raul Fernandez 表示，DXC 的投资者日制定了到 2029 财年的财务框架，要求在与 Anthropic 建立新的全球合作伙伴关系的支持下，恢复有机增长、提高非 GAAP 息税前利润率和强劲的自由现金流。
  • 股东选举了全部九名董事，并批准德勤为审计师，但他们拒绝了扩大 2017 年综合激励计划的提议，尽管他们批准了公司的咨询高管薪酬投票和单独的董事股权计划修正案。

DXC Technology（纽约证券交易所股票代码：DXC）举行了 2026 年年度股东大会，董事长 David Herzog 承认对公司 2026 财年的股票表现不满意，同时指出人工智能举措和最近概述的财务目标是公司扭亏为盈战略的关键要素。

赫尔佐格代表董事会表示，董事们“对 2026 财年我们的股价表现并不满意”，并致力于长期股东价值增值。 他表示，董事会正在与高级领导层合作，制定一条通往“可持续、盈利增长”的道路。

→ 回购热潮：这 3 家公司在自己的股票上押注数十亿美元

Herzog 强调了他所说的公司未来的“令人鼓舞的构建模块”，包括 DXC 产品中注入人工智能的新解决方案。 他表示，该公司运营客户关键任务系统的能力支撑着其全球基础设施业务。 Herzog 还指出 DXC 的保险软件和服务业务是市场领导者，其基于人工智能的应用程序旨在实现遗留基础设施的现代化，而无需进行昂贵或有风险的替换项目。

首席执行官指出投资者日框架和人类合作伙伴关系

DXC 总裁兼首席执行官劳尔·费尔南德斯 (Raul Fernandez) 表示，该公司利用上个月在纽约举行的投资者日展示了“清晰且令人信服的 DXC 发展蓝图”。

→ 随着人工智能贸易开始破裂，网络安全股票保持坚挺

费尔南德斯表示，DXC 概述了到 2029 财年的严格财务框架，包括恢复有机增长、扩大非 GAAP 息税前利润率以及持续强劲的自由现金流生成。 他表示，公司明确表示本财年代表着一个过渡。
